/app/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ "-s WASM=1" "-s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1" "-s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['FS','ccall','cwrap']" "-s MODULARIZE=0" "-s SINGLE_FILE=0" --bind CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Opcodes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Disassembler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/CFG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Deobfuscator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Assembler.cpp.o -o lua_deobfuscator.js
